summary: Performs arithmetic operations on CHOP channels: range mapping, clamping, gain, offset, and multi-input combine operations (Add, Multiply, etc.).

key_params.name: fromrange1
key_params.note: Input range start for range mapping

key_params.name: torange1
key_params.note: Output range start for range mapping

common_gotchas: The Range page is only active when the Combine CHOPs parameter on the Mult-Add page is Off.
With multiple inputs, the Combine CHOPs mode determines how channels across inputs are merged.
